name: Mini-fy
purpose: A portability-first OpenClaw workspace pack tuned for efficiency, source discipline, verification, and workload-specific profiles.

template_only.meaning: The repo is cloned but may not be the configured active workspace.
next_steps: Run scripts/install.ps1 or scripts/install.sh to merge Mini-fy into the real workspace.
Restart OpenClaw or start a new session.

active_workspace.meaning: The configured OpenClaw workspace path matches this repo or the installed Mini-fy copy.
next_steps: Apply a workload profile if needed.
Run evals after any material change.

installed_not_verified.meaning: Mini-fy is installed but the active workspace path, skills, or OpenClaw health have not yet been confirmed.
next_steps: Run openclaw skills list, openclaw status, and openclaw memory status if available.

scripts.purpose: Merge Mini-fy into an existing workspace with backups.
One-command activation flow for fresh or merge mode with optional profile and doctor run.
Safely merge Mini-fy config snippets into ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json.
Append profile guidance and install profile-specific skills.
Print a concise OpenClaw CLI health snapshot from the terminal.
Verify workspace completeness, active-workspace status, active profiles, and OpenClaw command health.
Run Mini-fy eval sets or validate them in skip-run mode.
Run local parser, script, and eval validation checks for the repo itself.

openclaw_commands: openclaw agent --message "What workspace files are loaded every session?"
